The tornado, part of a larger tornado outbreak spanning from April 6–8, was the third of eight tornadoes to be rated EF4/F4 or higher during the year of 2025, and the second of three tornadoes to be rated EF4/F4 or higher in the state of Mississippi during 2025. The tornado was part of a larger tornado that damaged or destroyed over 100 campsites and cabins at the resort, causing an estimated $1.35 million in damage. There were no fatalities, but at least 18 people were injured.
